scripts.start: npm run check:node && concurrently -n "FRONTEND,BACKEND" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend"
scripts.dev: npm run check:node && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run check:node && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm run check:node && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.backend: npm run check:node && npm start --prefix backend
